name: Harmonizing AI Safety Thresholds

description: arXiv:2607.16112v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Frontier AI companies have published capability thresholds that differ substantially, making it difficult for third parties to verify whether a threshold has been crossed or to compare requirements across companies. Moreover, without common minimum thresholds, risk mitigation may be inconsistent, creating a potential race to the bottom in safety s...
author: Wilber Sean Anterola, Matthew Ball, Luis F. Lafuerza, Markov Grey
